subject: Fwd: Re: HARBOUR-7 — small change in line 2 + extra item
body:
FYI — fwd to keep director in the loop.

---------- Forwarded message ----------

Update to the BOM I sent this morning:

- LINE 2: change galvanized B from 3mm to 5mm. Qty stays 45 TON.
- NEW LINE 4: stainless 316L sheet 1.5mm, 8 TON.

Note: Order line 4 batch with a +2mm tolerance due to port humidity — we will trim on arrival.
